name: Alvaro Folgado Rueda
why_notable: Created dirb — one of the first dedicated web directory brute-force tools. The bundled wordlists (common.txt, big.txt, small.txt) that shipped with dirb were the community standard for web path enumeration before SecLists centralized everything. big.txt still appears as a default or reference in tools and courses today. Dirb's impact on web application pentesting far exceeded its creator's public visibility — a pattern common in security tooling.
